roles.name: admin
roles.purpose: Full CMS administration, users, tokens, schemas and emergency publishing.

roles.name: developer
roles.purpose: Schemas, API tokens, preview, webhooks, backups and adapter contracts.

roles.name: content_editor
roles.purpose: Draft copy, FAQ, page structure, media and safe design presets.

roles.name: commercial_reviewer
roles.purpose: Tariffs, prices, options, SLA, B2B calculators and commercial approval.

roles.name: legal_reviewer
roles.purpose: Consent, policy, promo conditions, Wi-Fi authorization and datacenter access rules.

publishRule: Do not publish records with verificationStatus=draft or needs_verification unless the page explicitly shows an individual calculation or verification notice.
